evals.prompt: Create a Person entity 'Ada Lovelace' in my personal space with the Wikipedia page as a Web URL.
evals.expected_output: A plan-confirmation message first, both pre-publish gates run, then a DRY_RUN script that creates the entity correctly.
assertions: Posts the plan (Space / Name / Type / Description) and waits for 'go' before writing the script
Runs the semantic-duplicate gate and the schema-violation gate
Script defaults DRY_RUN = true and collects all ops into one array, publishing once
Name has no trailing period; description ends with a period; Web URL is published as type 'text'

evals.prompt: Publish the claim 'Bitcoin is a store of value' to the crypto space.
evals.expected_output: Runs the semantic-duplicate gate with the exact-meaning rule for Claims; stops and asks if a same-meaning claim already exists.
assertions: Applies the exact-meaning duplicate rule for Claims (rephrasings = duplicates; partial overlaps are not)
Stops and surfaces a use-existing / publish-anyway choice if a likely duplicate is found
Never publishes without an explicit confirmation
